horoscope: You're in strong shape for communicating, connecting, and networking, dear Aries. You might gain an advantage or edge through information, news, or an important project now, or you might form or enhance a mutually beneficial relationship. Cooperation goes a little deeper today, as you're supporting and boosting others, and they return the favor. A Venus-Neptune square comes into play as the advances, and it may cloud your perception of those things in which your heart is very much involved. Your desire for security, comfort, and peace is particularly strong these days with Venus now in your home and family sector, but today, you may feel a little unfulfilled or yearning for more than the usual or ordinary. You're also particularly sensitive to imbalances in your personal life. Do your best to avoid emotional extremes, and take the time to get in touch with your real needs.

Constructive and respectful conversations and shared activities can figure strongly and feel great, dear Taurus. It's an excellent time to gain an edge in your work or business. However, as the day advances, a Venus-Neptune square can point to blurred or distorted perceptions of value, and transportation or communications systems can be especially unreliable. You might be captivated by ideas, objects, or people, but you are unlikely to be seeing these things clearly just for now. Wishful thinking can cloud the truth of a situation. While it's undoubtedly pleasant in the present, disappointment can follow. As such, try to keep your feet on the ground.

Today is good for personal appeal and gaining respect, admiration, or support, dear Gemini. Even so, as the day advances, a Venus-Neptune square comes into play, and you can be a little elusive or face elusiveness in others. If you are not feeling equipped to make decisions and commitments temporarily, it makes the most sense to wait until you're clear and confident. For now, wishful thinking tends to cloud a situation. Since you can be in a state of flux, it may be best to avoid lending and spending at the moment.

Today is strong for a sense you've gained an edge on an emotional level, dear Cancer. Your observations and insights are on point, and you see your inner needs and desires more clearly. However, as the day advances, your vision of a matter can become blurry. With Venus in your sign, you are more personable than usual these days. Still, a conflict between Venus and Neptune can render it a little too easy to misread a situation or to see things through the lens of wishful thinking. Confusion about your general direction can play with your mind and temporarily confuse your personal choices. Take steps to avoid paying too much for something or making promises that you are unlikely to want to fulfill later. If you've been chasing a dream that's leaving you exhausted, remind yourself that a dream is supposed to make you happy!

You're in an excellent position for connecting with others in empowering ways, dear Leo. There can be connections that benefit you. But as the day progresses, you may be more sensitive than usual on a social or affectionate level, which can lead to greater awareness of your vulnerabilities. Try not to let sentiment and whims blur your judgment if you're feeling misunderstood. Try to ride things out. The need for change may become evident, and it may take some time to figure out precisely what to do next, so be easy on yourself.

You're in a good position for work and career-related efforts, your reputation, and status, dear Virgo. You may be able to gain an edge or advantage over your competition in business, or simply a boost in popularity. As the day advances, the influence of a square between Venus and Neptune can mean something's up in the air. While it can play with your head, it's better to wait things out than make big decisions based on what you're seeing right now. Do your best not to over-commit. If financial or support issues are confusing, you can feel the uncertainty now more than usual, which can also affect your ability to enjoy yourself. Expectations of others may be set too high or too low, and the best strategy is to aim to enjoy yourself rather than pin your hopes on something in particular.

You're in good shape for creative self-expression, love, and confidence, dear Libra. You're comfortable pursuing your personal interests, and you're attracting others through your ideas, beliefs, or unique style. As the day advances, a Venus-Neptune square can point to a minor letdown if you haven't been viewing someone, a relationship, or a situation clearly. Although looking the other way can soothe you temporarily, you can't honestly fool yourself all the time. Aim to put illusions behind you and avoid letting confusion in your personal life affect your professional dealings today.

Today is useful for gaining the support of others, or for inner confidence, to pursue your goals, dear Scorpio. Family and loved ones can be in your corner now. Later today, things are a little blurrier temporarily, and uncertainty surrounding your work or schedule, or a commitment to take care of someone, can figure strongly. You can feel quite sensitive or vulnerable as you're more emotionally invested in an idea, dream, or belief. Be sure to take care of yourself, not only others, and aim to keep your feet on the ground. Narrowing tasks down can improve your mood.

Today brings strong energy for connecting with a partner or for partnering up to produce something special, dear Sagittarius. Collaboration and problem-solving figure strongly. As the day advances, however, you may not be in the best position to judge things in your personal life or in matters where you're emotionally invested. You may not see a situation clearly. It can be difficult to get firm commitments or definite answers to your questions, and it's best not to make significant or permanent decisions right now. Waiting makes more sense.

Energies for work and practical matters are particularly empowering for you, dear Capricorn. You can gain an edge or advantage with a real feel for what others want and confidence in what you're doing. However, as the day advances, your perception of a relationship may be a little off, whether it's due to wishful thinking or insecurities. Perhaps you are giving too much or too little to a situation, or you are having trouble seeing a matter objectively. There can be a vague yearning for something more from your connections. However, your best bet is to channel energies into a creative pursuit and take charge of your own happiness. This way, you avoid putting pressure on a relationship to be perfect or something it's not. At the same time, it's an opportunity to identify what may be missing in your life so you can plan to change the situation.

You're in a particularly good position for creative and expressive activities, dear Aquarius, and for gaining an edge in a romantic, playful, or creative pursuit. Still, as the day advances, expectations of others may be a little off the mark, with uncertainty hanging heavy over you. Don't undersell yourself, but avoid pinning all of your hopes on something far out of reach just for now. Time can be one of the best tools for testing a theory or perception, as it allows reason to set in! Avoid over-committing yourself.

Empowering energy is with you for domestic and personal matters, dear Pisces. You're feeling more inner courage and confidence, and support is easy to find and give. Living conditions may be improving, which boosts your mood. While Venus in your solar fifth house is strong for creative, pleasurable, and romantic pursuits these days, its square to Neptune now can be tricky for situations requiring objectivity. Under this blurry influence, you can find it difficult to see others and yourself clearly. Taking a risk or ignoring a problem can lead to unfavorable outcomes. Aim to invest your emotions in what you have and love, rather than pin your hopes on something out of reach for now. Don't sell yourself short, particularly in your relationships, but also in business.
